_comment: Project-scoped MCP servers agents are expected to use in this repo. 'jetbrains' (Rider MCP) is the mandated way to read/search/edit/build C#/.NET here — see CLAUDE.md HARD GATE. Requires JetBrains Rider open on this solution with the MCP plugin/proxy enabled; the proxy connects to the running IDE. Secrets and per-user servers (air-api, youtrack) are configured per-user, not committed.
